programs.title: Australian Crime Stories: The Investigators
programs.desc: (M) We take viewers on a compelling journey through the intricate and enduring investigation of one of the most enigmatic bank robbers in Australian history.

programs.title: Death By Fame
programs.desc: (M) Runway model turned mom-a-ger Samira Frasch turns up dead at the bottom of her pool. Police uncover a marriage filled with infidelities, accusations and deep motives.
